<var>
$DPS$ = Damage * Bullet Count / Firerate
$DPS2$ = Damage * (Bullet Count * Max Hits) / Firerate
$PDPS$ = Poison Damage / Tick
$CDPS$ = $DPS$ + $PDPS$
$CDPS2$ = $DPS2$ + $PDPS$
$TED$ = {{#expr:Poison Damage * floor((Poison Time / Tick))}}
$CE$ = Total Price / DPS
$TP$ = $FNC-TOTALPRICE$
$FNC-COST$ = 575; 500; 1475; 4850; 15115
$FNC-PVP-COST$ = 575; 450; 1475; 5150; 15115
$FNC-DETECTION$ = 1; 0;
$FNC-PVP-DETECTION$ = 1; 2;
$FNC-UPGRADE$ = Scam Artist; Brand New Rig; Black Market Tech; Neural-Runner
$FNC-UPGRADEICON$ = 138135211876727; 75068776606540; 121470510950529; 111948304760969
$DPREF$ = <ref name=dps>DPS assumes all bullets hit only one enemy.</ref>
</var>
<div class="mobile-tabber"><tabber>
|-|Regular =
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! Level !! Total Price !! Damage !! Bullet Count !! Poison Damage !! Firerate !! Tick !! Poison Time !! Slowdown !! Range !! Base Spread !! Spread !! Max Hits !! Neuralyze Duration !! Neuralyze Grenade Radius !! Damage Taken Bonus !! Total Elapsed Damage !! DPS$DPREF$ !! Cost Efficiency
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 2 || 3 || 1 || 1.2 || 0.9 || 3 || 7.5% || 11.5 || 3 || 2 || 1 || N/A || N/A || N/A || $TED$ || $CDPS$<ref>$DPS$ Normal DPS + $PDPS$ Poison DPS</ref> || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 1 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 2 || 3 || 1 || 1.2 || 0.9 || 3 || 7.5% || 11.5 || 3 || 2 || 2 || N/A || N/A || N/A || $TED$ || $CDPS2$<ref>$DPS2$ Normal DPS + $PDPS$ Poison DPS</ref> || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 4 || 3 || 2 || 1 || 0.9 || 5 || 7.5% || 13.5 || 3.5 || 1.5 || 2 || N/A || N/A || N/A || $TED$ || $CDPS2$<ref>$DPS2$ Normal DPS + $PDPS$ Poison DPS</ref> || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 7 || 4 || 4 || 0.9 || 0.6 || 6 || 7.5% || 14.5 || 3.5 || 1.5 || 2|| 5 || 3.5 || 10% || $TED$ || $CDPS2$<ref>$DPS2$ Normal DPS + $PDPS$ Poison DPS</ref> || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 7 || 6 || 7 || 0.65 || 0.4 || 7 || 10% || 16 || 4 || 1 || 3 || 9 || 3.5 || 15% || $TED$ || $CDPS2$<ref>$DPS2$ Normal DPS + $PDPS$ Poison DPS</ref> || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>
|-|PVP = 
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! Level !! Total Price !! Damage !! Bullet Count !! Poison Damage !! Firerate !! Tick !! Poison Time !! Slowdown !! Range !! Base Spread !! Spread !! Max Hits !! Neuralyze Duration !! Neuralyze Grenade Radius !! Damage Taken Bonus !! Total Elapsed Damage !! DPS$DPREF$ !! Cost Efficiency
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 2 || 3 || 1 || 1.1 || 0.9 || 4 || 10% || 11.5 || 3 || 2 || 1 || N/A || N/A || N/A || $TED$ || $CDPS$<ref>$DPS$ Normal DPS + $PDPS$ Poison DPS</ref> || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 1 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 2 || 3 || 1 || 1.1 || 0.9 || 4 || 10% || 11.5 || 3 || 2 || 2 || N/A || N/A || N/A || $TED$ || $CDPS2$<ref>$DPS2$ Normal DPS + $PDPS$ Poison DPS</ref> || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 4 || 3 || 2 || 1.1 || 0.9 || 5 || 10% || 14.5 || 3.5 || 1.5 || 2 || N/A || N/A || N/A || $TED$ || $CDPS2$<ref>$DPS2$ Normal DPS + $PDPS$ Poison DPS</ref> || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 7 || 3 || 4 || 0.9 || 0.6 || 5.5 || 10% || 14.5 || 3.5 || 1.5 || 2 || 5 || 3.5 || 15% || $TED$ || $CDPS2$<ref>$DPS2$ Normal DPS + $PDPS$ Poison DPS</ref> || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 7 || 5 || 7 || 0.65 || 0.4 || 7 || 15% || 14.5 || 4 || 1 || 3 || 9 || 3.5 || 25% || $TED$ || $CDPS2$<ref>$DPS2$ Normal DPS + $PDPS$ Poison DPS</ref> || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>
</tabber></div>
